entry.name: codexbarPath
entry.label: Path to the codexbar CLI binary.

entry.name: showPace
entry.label: Show pace summary lines under usage bars.

entry.name: selectedProviders
entry.label: Comma-separated provider ids to display. Empty means the providers enabled in the CodexBar CLI config.

entry.name: cacheJson
entry.label: Serialized last-known usage data, shown instantly on startup while a refresh runs in the background.
